title: erysimum glabrum
intro: Erysimum glabrum, also known as Woolly Wallflower, is a flowering plant species native to the western United States. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, colds, and respiratory problems due to its high content of essential oils and flavonoids. In herbal medicine, Erysimum glabrum is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting overall well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
